channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Cut the grass in the children’s play area, 30th June
item.description:
The grass is too long for toddlers and small children in the benhall play area. It’s messy and itchy and the long grass means that kids cannot see the cracks in the ground causing tripping hazards. Please can the grass in the children’s play area be cut asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Draycot Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 30th June
item.description:
Permanent repair Give and take 28 day plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference 1200x1600x30 mm stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 30th June
item.description:
NWD Give and take MAKE SAFE X2 1 METERS BARRIERS PLACE AROUND DAMAGED FOOTWAY (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 30th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please lift and relay x1 raised rocking 900x100x30mm (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 30th June
item.description:
Pothole CW 600x200x40mm approx Road closure Stats (CW6 Pothole)

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 30th June

item.title: Road surface as come away about 4m x 2m, large stones are being caught by vehicles which is dangerous, 30th June
item.description:
Opposite no 9
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Paddocks Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 30th June
item.description:
Give and take temporary footway closure 28 day please cut back overgrown hedge to lower level to gain visibility better approx 10 meters x1.2 meters (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree across path, 30th June
item.description:
Large fallen tree blocking the path from the end of Sandy Lane to Leckhampton Hill, alongside golf course. Before gate half way up hill.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Timbercombe Lane, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken bus stop window, 30th June
item.description:
There’s a broken bus stop window at Recreation Ground (by Prince of Wales Stadium)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tommy Taylors Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The grass to be cut back front of 2 - 3 Pippin Close., 30th June
item.description:
Email of 26/6/26 1630 hours - I have received a report from a resident at Pippin Close, Abbeymead, Gloucester requesting the grass be cut back front of 2 - 3 Pippin Close. Can it be arranged for the grass to be cut back.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pippin Close, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 30th June

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 30th June
item.description:
3 months Road closure please refresh give way markings markings approx 20 600x200mm dots plus x 12 600x100mm dots plus x2 3 metres lines plus x1 3 meters triangle (Faded Road Markings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 30th June
item.description:
3 way stop and go 28 day please trim down overgrown grass obstruction from junction exit approx 20 metres x1 meter (Embankment & Cuttings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large and deep potholes each side of ford, 30th June
item.description:
Large potholes each side of the ford when entering Sevenhampton need repairing immediately

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possibly a dead tree., 30th June
item.description:
On the edge of the green space at the top of The Grove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, The Grove, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
